warm-background.purpose: Page background for the local dashboard.

card-white.purpose: Cards, forms, tables, sidebar, and data surfaces.

primary-teal.purpose: Primary action, active state, trusted status, and product mark.

secondary-orange.purpose: Secondary emphasis and cost-oriented chart color.

muted-warm.purpose: Hover surfaces, low-emphasis panels, and secondary badges.

muted-ink.purpose: Supporting copy, helper labels, and inactive navigation.

border-warm.purpose: Dividers, borders, inputs, cards, and table rows.

headline.purpose: Page titles such as Overview, Settings, Diagnostics, and Pricing.

title.purpose: Card titles and compact section headers.

body.purpose: Interface copy, form controls, tables, descriptions, and chart labels.

label.purpose: Table headers, badges, helper labels, and compact status details.

shadows.name: input-low
shadows.purpose: Subtle editability cue for inputs on card surfaces.

motion.name: state-color
motion.value: color 150ms ease-out, background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out
motion.purpose: Default state feedback for controls and rows.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button for configuration, scans, applies, and submits.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display: inline-flex; height: 36px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 6px; border: 0; background: #147b74; color: #ffffff; padding: 0 12px; font: 500 14px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb, #147b74 90%, #000000); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #147b74; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Standard Card
components.description: Bordered white data surface for metrics, charts, filters, and tables.
components.html:
Token Trend

Daily, weekly, and monthly token usage.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid #ded7cf; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; color: #14181f; padding: 16px; box-shadow: none; } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 6px; font: 600 14px/1.35 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #646a78; font: 400 14px/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Default Input
components.description: Compact field for dates, filters, paths, and pricing settings.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 36px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #ded7cf; background: #ffffff; color: #14181f; padding: 4px 12px; font: 400 14px/1.5 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #147b74; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Badge
components.description: Compact status or filter badge for low-emphasis labels.
components.css: .ds-badge-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #efebe6; color: #646a78; padding: 2px 8px; font: 500 12px/1.25 -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; }
